emails.subject: Fwd: 1963 - 1998 Watch/Warning
emails.body: ---------------------- Forwarded by Todd Kimberlain/NA/Enron on 12/14/2000 11:07 AM Jack Beven <beven@nhc.noaa.gov> on 12/14/2000 10:58:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Fwd: 1963 - 1998 Watch/Warning
emails.body: Re: Fwd: 1963 1998 Watch/Warning Todd, Thanks for the info. I may need some help decoding the info so we can get exact durations for warnings. However, I think we should wait until we get a genuine expression of interest from a counterparty before we spend any more time on this. It's definitely good that we have this data though should we need it. Pre-1963 is probably not necessary at this time. Thanks, Charlie
